info.name: Task Item API
info.description: Collection for testing Task Item endpoints (create/get) including referenceLink and rawDataLink fields.

body.raw:
{
  "title": "Prepare campaign assets",
  "employeeId": "EMP-1781959865954",
  "dueDate": "2026-07-05T17:00:00.000Z",
  "priority": "HIGH",
  "description": "Collect reference images and raw footage.",
  "status": "DRAFT",
  "referenceLink": "https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/example-ref",
  "rawDataLink": "https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/example-raw"
}

request.description: Create a task item under a task. Allowed roles: ADMIN, HR, MANAGER. `referenceLink` and `rawDataLink` are optional string URIs.
Retrieve task items for the specified task. Responses include `referenceLink` and `rawDataLink` fields when present.
